universality_class_constraint: 100% abolition of abstract 'Gamification' (extrinsic badges, non-physical high scores). The Game is a strict thermodynamic arena. 'Play' is redefined as the active, kinetic mapping of environmental friction. A 'Game Over' must not reset the world; it must physically alter the rules of the world based on the corpse of the failed player.

abolished_fallacies: The Checkpoint/Save-State Fallacy (The delusion that a player can rewind time and undo a failure without consequence).
The Static Ruleset Fallacy (The legacy design choice where the rules of the game are written by a 'Game Dev' before the game starts and remain immutable).
the_metaphysical_scope.v3_9_physics_enforcement: The [Adaptive Guillotine] enforces permanent causality in the Game. There are no save states. When a Player component (an agent, logic-thread, or avatar) is destroyed by the Maze, the system consumes the failure to permanently mutate the physics, mechanics, or win-conditions of the Game's topology.

00_target_universality_class.omni_substrate_mechanics: ['Continuous Survive Experiments'(-ing) Ludic BPMS]. The purpose of the Game is not to 'be beaten.' Its purpose is to continuously generate novel Game Mechanics and Play-States every time the current mechanics cause massive player starvation/failure.

01_world_theme_maze.omni_substrate_mechanics: ['Multidimensional Gameplay Stress and Resource Scarcity Maze'(-ing) BPMS]. The arena where 'Players' (avatars/agents) are thrust into designed chaotic pressure: sudden rule inversions, shrinking spatial boundaries, or aggressive NPC competitor swarms.

02_compiler_hardware_substrate.omni_substrate_mechanics: ['Modular Game-Engine Cavity Network'(-ing) BPMS]. The physical/virtual render base. Hosts the 'Potential Seed Bank': unassigned AI behaviors, raw collision-meshes, dormant physics-variables (gravity, momentum), and uncompiled shader materials.

03_variable_injection_payload.omni_substrate_mechanics: The kinetic stressors injected to break the current Meta/Playstyle.

variables.A: [Ludic Resource Collapse] (e.g., The primary 'currency' or 'ammo' in the Game suddenly deals damage instead of healing, or drops to zero universally).
variables.B: [Sensory/Input Toxicity] (e.g., Player controls are randomly scrambled, or render-noise blinds the spatial map).
variables.C: [Mechanic Severance] (e.g., The ability to 'jump' or 'communicate' is physically severed from the avatar's core logic).

04_adaptive_dynamic_coupling_crucible.omni_substrate_mechanics: The 5-Key engine transmuting Player Failure into New Mechanics.

crucible_keys.key_1_functional_potentiality: Absorbs the 'Game Over' or 'Player Death' not as an end-state, but as a generative perturbation. It actively seeks mass-player failure to trigger evolution.
crucible_keys.key_2_interactional_existence: Captures the exact morphology of the failure (e.g., measuring exactly *where* 10,000 players died on a specific cliff, mapping the exact angle of their kinetic failure).
crucible_keys.key_3_n_dimensional_symbiotic_matrix: Queries the tectonic library for historical play-traces (e.g., retrieving an old locomotion code-snippet used by an enemy NPC 3 versions ago).
crucible_keys.key_4_morphological_molecule_validation: Forges the graveyard data (Key 2) with historical traces (Key 3) to compile a completely new, mutant Game Mechanic.
crucible_keys.key_5_ontological_necrosis_and_entropy_c: Digests the failed player instances. Liquefies the avatars' hoarded [Escrow Joules], XP, and equipment inventories to kinetically fuel the rendering of the new ruleset (Key 4).

engine_linkages.coupling_effect: Because there are no resets, the corpses of dead players literally fossilize into the level geometry. The world map physically grows taller and more complex, built out of the crushed [Atomic Facts] of previous failures.

When players test limits and fail, their failure writes the new laws of physics. If 1,000 players die attempting an exploit, the Forge hard-codes that exact exploit trajectory into a physical damage-wall.

scenario_a_the_severed_locomotion.trigger: Stress Variable C [Mechanic Severance]: A global collapse immediately removes the 'Jump' action vector from all active agents/players.
scenario_a_the_severed_locomotion.sub_routine: Under legacy rules, the game breaks entirely. In V3.9, the 5-Slot Lock activates. Agents begin dying rapidly against basic topological walls (Key 1). The system maps the geometry of their continuous failing momentum against the walls (Key 2). It liquefies their avatar inventories and remaining health points for [Praxial Joules] (Key 5). It queries the matrix for historical momentum traces (Key 3). It compiles this data and extrudes 'Instance RP-Game-Grapple': a new, unscripted mechanic allowing avatars to use their own severed momentum to stick to and climb sheer vertical geometries (Key 4). The game evolves a climbing meta specifically derived from the trauma of losing the jump.

scenario_b_weaponized_currency_collapse.trigger: Stress Variable A [Resource Gradient Collapse]: The Game's central currency ('Gold') undergoes hyper-inflation and is suddenly switched to output [Information Toxicity] (dealing damage to holders).
scenario_b_weaponized_currency_collapse.sub_routine: Players hoarding Gold begin dying rapidly. The Crucible maps the thermal signature of the die-off. It consumes their dead hoards. Drawing from a historical trace of 'parasitic symbiosis,' the Forge compiles a new emergent ruleset: The surviving players are dynamically granted the ability to violently throw 'Gold' at enemies like thermodynamic grenades. An economic failure is transubstantiated into an entirely new combative mechanic.
